message:
fix(tests): use CARGO_MANIFEST_DIR for reliable test file path resolution

Replace repo_root().join(...) with PathBuf::from(env!("CARGO_MANIFEST_DIR"))
in t4_transport_invariants_are_contract_enforced to ensure the quic_h3_e2e.rs
file path resolves correctly regardless of the working directory from which
cargo test is invoked.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
